LSE-HS10-L1-13001400-HSSCIENG910-ESC-EUR-01 • HS Science Engineering Design 9-10 • Breaking Large Problems Into Sub-Problems

The Cathedral Door Lock

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the boy trying to do?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Pinpoint the moment when the boy turns away from the all-at-once approach and points the girl toward one piece. Name that pivot precisely.
